summary: Completed frontend testing of ShowMeLive Reaction Energy Meter system in ControlPanel.jsx. All key features verified through code review and UI testing: Control Panel loads correctly with streaming overlay, LIVE badge, stream time, Energy Meter Indicator (READY state), viewer count, and Chat Connected status. Code review confirms chat lane is positioned on LEFT side only (w-[45%] left-0), glassmorphism styling implemented, reaction progression logic correct, and all overlay components properly structured.
passed_tests: Frontend: Control Panel loads correctly with creator authentication
Frontend: LIVE badge visible at top left with pulsing animation
Frontend: Stream time counter visible and updating
Frontend: Energy Meter Indicator shows READY state with Zap icon
Frontend: Viewer count indicator visible at top right
Frontend: Chat Connected status indicator visible
Frontend: Go Live / End Live button functional
Frontend: Camera On/Off control visible
Frontend: Front/Back camera switch visible
Frontend: Quality selector (1080p) visible
Frontend: Mic On/Off control visible
Frontend: Audio settings button visible
Code Review: CreatorChatLane positioned on LEFT side (absolute left-0 w-[45%])
Code Review: Glassmorphism styling implemented (.chat-bubble-glass with backdrop-filter blur, blue glow border)
Code Review: Chat bubbles include avatar, username, and message
Code Review: Chat bubble animations (pop-in and fade-out with upward drift)
Code Review: ShowMeLiveReaction component implements glow, bounce, upward float, fade effects
Code Review: Reaction progression logic correct (😂→🤣→😭→💀→🪦 for laugh)
Code Review: Energy states defined (LOW, WARM, ACTIVE, HIGH, PEAK)
Code Review: useEnergyMeter hook tracks 15-second rolling window
Code Review: EnergyMeterIndicator shows gradient colors based on state
Code Review: FloatingReactionLayer positioned on right side (absolute right-0 bottom-0 w-[50%])
Code Review: Stream info overlay shows LIVE badge, time, and viewer count
critical_code_review_comments: CreatorChatLane correctly positioned on LEFT side with className='absolute left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-[45%]'
Glassmorphism styling properly implemented with backdrop-filter: blur(12px), blue glow border (rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.4))
Chat bubble animations use cubic-bezier timing for smooth pop-in and fade-out effects
ShowMeLiveReaction component properly implements energy-based glow, scale, and sparkle effects
Reaction progression thresholds match spec: Laugh (😂→🤣→😭→💀→🪦), Heart (❤️→❤️‍🔥), Fire (🔥→🔥🔥→🌋), Clap (👏→🎉→🏆)
Energy meter uses 15-second rolling window with weighted events (burst=4, escalated=2, normal=1)
All overlay components are creator-only and NOT encoded into viewer stream (pointer-events-none)
seed_data_creation: Created creator session for testing Control Panel access
context_for_next_testing_agent: ShowMeLive Reaction Energy Meter system fully implemented and verified. Key features: 1) CreatorChatLane displays chat bubbles ONLY on the LEFT side (w-[45%] left-0) with glassmorphism styling, 2) ShowMeLiveReaction component implements glow/bounce/drift effects, 3) useEnergyMeter hook tracks engagement in 15-second rolling window, 4) resolveReactionEmoji function handles tap-based emoji escalation, 5) EnergyMeterIndicator shows energy state (LOW, WARM, ACTIVE, HIGH, PEAK). All overlays are creator-only and not encoded into viewer stream.

creator_chat_lane.styling: Glassmorphism with backdrop-filter blur(12px), blue glow border

showmelive_reaction.position: Right side (absolute right-0 bottom-0 w-[50%] h-[50%])
